chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 580 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for the Respondents/SEPCO Mr. Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Soomro, Special Prosecutor, NAB Sukkur Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press this Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
